import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/pages/platform-admin/AITraining.tsx");import { jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/platform-admin/AITraining.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import { useState } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-base";
import { Upload, FileText, Sparkles, Database, TrendingUp, CheckCircle, Clock, Trash2, Eye } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=25293e4c";
import { TrainingDataUploadModal } from "/src/app/components/TrainingDataUploadModal.tsx";
import { useApp } from "/src/app/contexts/AppContext.tsx";
const mockTrainingDocs = [
  { id: "1", name: "Aged Care Act 1997", type: "legislation", source: "Federal Register", uploadDate: "2025-03-15", status: "trained", tokenCount: 45200 },
  { id: "2", name: "NDIS Practice Standards", type: "legislation", source: "NDIS Commission", uploadDate: "2025-03-14", status: "trained", tokenCount: 38900 },
  { id: "3", name: "Quality Standards Framework", type: "guideline", source: "Internal", uploadDate: "2025-03-12", status: "processing", tokenCount: 12400 },
  { id: "4", name: "Charter of Aged Care Rights", type: "legislation", source: "Government", uploadDate: "2025-03-10", status: "trained", tokenCount: 8600 }
];
export default function AITraining() {
  _s();
  const { addAuditLog } = useApp();
  const [trainingDocs, setTrainingDocs] = useState(mockTrainingDocs);
  const [showUploadModal, setShowUploadModal] = useState(false);
  const handleUploadDocument = (data) => {
    const newDoc = {
      id: `doc-${Date.now()}`,
      name: data.name,
      type: data.type,
      source: data.source,
      uploadDate: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString().split("T")[0],
      status: "processing",
      tokenCount: 0
    };
    setTrainingDocs([newDoc, ...trainingDocs]);
    addAuditLog({
      action: "Training Data Uploaded",
      details: `Uploaded training document: ${data.name} (${data.type})`
    });
    alert("✅ Document uploaded successfully and added to training queue!");
    setTimeout(() => {
      setTrainingDocs((docs) => docs.map(
        (doc) => doc.id === newDoc.id ? { ...doc, status: "trained", tokenCount: Math.floor(Math.random() * 5e4) + 5e3 } : doc
      ));
      addAuditLog({
        action: "AI Model Trained",
        details: `Training completed for: ${data.name}`
      });
    }, 5e3);
  };
  const handleDeleteDocument = (id, name) => {
    if (confirm(`Are you sure you want to remove "${name}" from training data?`)) {
      setTrainingDocs(trainingDocs.filter((doc) => doc.id !== id));
      addAuditLog({
        action: "Training Data Removed",
        details: `Removed training document: ${name}`
      });
      alert("Document removed from training data!");
    }
  };
  const handleStartTraining = (id, name) => {
    setTrainingDocs((docs) => docs.map(
      (doc) => doc.id === id ? { ...doc, status: "processing" } : doc
    ));
    addAuditLog({
      action: "AI Training Started",
      details: `Started training for: ${name}`
    });
    setTimeout(() => {
      setTrainingDocs((docs) => docs.map(
        (doc) => doc.id === id ? { ...doc, status: "trained", tokenCount: Math.floor(Math.random() * 5e4) + 5e3 } : doc
      ));
      addAuditLog({
        action: "AI Training Completed",
        details: `Training completed for: ${name}`
      });
      alert("✅ Training completed successfully!");
    }, 3e3);
  };
  const totalTokens = trainingDocs.reduce((sum, doc) => sum + doc.tokenCount, 0);
  const trainedCount = trainingDocs.filter((doc) => doc.status === "trained").length;
  const processingCount = trainingDocs.filter((doc) => doc.status === "processing").length;
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "blp0", _fgB: 1779104380836, _fgD: true, className: "space-y-6", "data-fg-blp0": "418.270:418.11477:/src/app/pages/platform-admin/AITraining.tsx:114:5:4051:7419:e:div:xtetxtetxtetxtetxte:1", children: [
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "blp2", _fgB: 1779104380836, className: "flex items-center justify-between", "data-fg-blp2": "418.270:418.11477:/src/app/pages/platform-admin/AITraining.tsx:116:7:4106:602:e:div:ete", children: [
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "blp3", _fgB: 1779104380836, "data-fg-blp3": "418.270:418.11477:/src/app/pages/platform-admin/AITraining.tsx:117:9:4166:206:e:div:ete", children: [

_s(AITraining, "hH0liAeeKvFcG4OkN0jQ+QcP/6A=", false, function() {
  return [useApp];
});
_c = AITraining;
var _c;
$RefreshReg$(_c, "AITraining");
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  window.$RefreshReg$ = prevRefreshReg;
  window.$RefreshSig$ = prevRefreshSig;
}
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/platform-admin/AITraining.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
      const invalidateMessage = RefreshRuntime.validateRefreshBoundaryAndEnqueueUpdate("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/platform-admin/AITraining.tsx", currentExports, nextExports);
      if (invalidateMessage) import.meta.hot.invalidate(invalidateMessage);
    });
  });
}
